name: Roadside Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw the frozen hash browns and place them in a small roasting pan.
2. Melt the butter in the half-and-half.
3. Add salt to the melted butter mixture.
4. Pour the butter and milk mixture over the hash browns.
5. Sprinkle Parmesan cheese evenly over the potatoes.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes, covered for the first hour.
7. Remove the cover and continue baking until browned.
